instructions.title: Features & Capabilities
instructions.subtitle: Learn how the evaluation process works for both roles
instructions.evaluatorDescription: As an evaluator, you manage the evaluation process, configure profiles, and analyze results.
instructions.evaluatedDescription: As a candidate, you complete evaluations to showcase your competencies and receive personalized feedback.

whatIsEvaluatedItems.professional: Professional competencies — Technical knowledge, industry expertise, and role-specific skills
whatIsEvaluatedItems.softSkills: Soft skills — Communication, teamwork, leadership, and interpersonal abilities
whatIsEvaluatedItems.readiness: Readiness for change — Adaptability, innovation mindset, and openness to new challenges
whatIsEvaluatedItems.cognitive: Cognitive abilities — Logical reasoning, problem-solving, and analytical thinking (timed IQ-style test)
whatIsEvaluatedItems.personality: Personality profile — Big Five (OCEAN) traits: openness, conscientiousness, extraversion, agreeableness, neuroticism
whatIsEvaluatedItems.disc: Behavioral style — DISC assessment: Dominance, Influence, Steadiness, Conscientiousness
whatIsEvaluatedItems.aptitude: Aptitude — Numerical, verbal, and analytical reasoning abilities
whatIsEvaluatedItems.technical: Technical knowledge — Case study-based evaluation specific to the role

evaluatorSteps.title: Steps for the Evaluator
evaluatorSteps.step1: Log in to the admin panel at Administration > Login with your credentials
evaluatorSteps.step2: Select or create the evaluation profile that matches the role you are assessing
evaluatorSteps.step3: Generate a shareable evaluation link and send it to the candidate
evaluatorSteps.step4: Wait for the candidate to complete the evaluation — you will see results in the admin panel
evaluatorSteps.step5: Review the results: competency indices, assigned profiles, strengths, and growth areas
evaluatorSteps.step6: Optionally, use Job-Fit analysis to compare the candidate against job requirements
evaluatorSteps.step7: Export results as PDF or use the comparison tool to evaluate multiple candidates side by side

evaluatedSteps.title: Steps for the Candidate
evaluatedSteps.step1: Open the evaluation link provided by your evaluator, or select a profile from the home page
evaluatedSteps.step2: Fill in your basic information (name and email)
evaluatedSteps.step3: Answer all questions honestly — there are no right or wrong answers for competency questions
evaluatedSteps.step4: For timed tests (cognitive, aptitude), manage your time carefully — the timer is visible on screen
evaluatedSteps.step5: For personality and DISC tests, choose the answer that best describes your natural behavior
evaluatedSteps.step6: Submit your evaluation — results are generated automatically
evaluatedSteps.step7: Review your results: you will see your competency scores, strengths, and personalized recommendations

evaluatorTips.tip1: You can configure which tests to include when creating an evaluation link
evaluatorTips.tip2: Use the history section to track all past evaluations and filter by date or candidate
evaluatorTips.tip3: The AI analysis (when enabled) provides deeper insights and training recommendations

evaluatedTips.tip1: Find a quiet environment with a stable internet connection before starting
evaluatedTips.tip2: Answer based on your actual behavior, not what you think is expected
evaluatedTips.tip3: You can download your results as a PDF for your records

instructions.newSubtitle: Discover all the tools and features of the skaills platform

evaluationsSection.title: Competency Evaluations
evaluationsSection.description: Evaluate professional skills, soft skills, and readiness for change across 43 profiles in 15 industry sectors.

features.f1: 43 evaluation profiles across 15 sectors and 5 levels (executive to operative)
features.f3: Automated scoring with AI-powered analysis and recommendations
features.f4: Shareable evaluation links for remote candidate assessment
features.f5: PDF export and detailed results with strength/growth analysis

testsSection.title: Specialized Tests
testsSection.description: Go beyond competencies with cognitive, personality, behavioral, aptitude, and technical assessments.

cognitive.title: Cognitive Test
cognitive.desc: 20 timed IQ-style questions measuring logical reasoning, pattern recognition, and problem-solving. Results include IQ estimate and percentile ranking.

personality.title: Personality Profile
personality.desc: 50-question Big Five (OCEAN) assessment measuring Openness, Conscientiousness, Extraversion, Agreeableness, and Neuroticism.

disc.title: DISC Assessment
disc.desc: 28 forced-choice pairs measuring behavioral style: Dominance, Influence, Steadiness, and Conscientiousness.

aptitude.title: Aptitude Test
aptitude.desc: 20 questions evaluating numerical reasoning, verbal comprehension, and analytical thinking abilities.

technical.title: Technical Knowledge
technical.desc: Case study-based evaluation with role-specific scenarios testing practical knowledge and decision-making.

profilesSection.title: Professional Profiles
profilesSection.description: Browse and select from 43 evaluation profiles organized by industry sector and career level.
profilesSection.sectors: 15 industry sectors including technology, banking, healthcare, insurance, education, hospitality, and more
profilesSection.levels: 5 career levels: Executive, Managerial, Professional/Specialist, Administrative, Operative
profilesSection.customizable: Each profile includes tailored competency categories and evaluation questions

recruitmentSection.title: Recruitment Process
recruitmentSection.description: Manage the complete recruitment process with positions, candidates, and structured campaigns.

features.f1: Define open positions with title, department, description, and status (draft, open, closed, on hold)
features.f2: Link positions to job profiles for automatic candidate scoring
features.f3: View how many candidates apply to each position and their pipeline status
features.f4: Recruitment campaigns with step-by-step wizard: Planning → Preparation → Execution → Review → Follow Up
features.f5: Two built-in templates: Standard Recruitment and Career Day, customizable and duplicable
features.f6: Automatic insights and recommendations at each campaign stage
features.f7: Link campaigns to positions and candidates for comprehensive tracking
features.f8: Real-time dashboard with stats: open positions, active candidates, running campaigns

candidatesSection.title: Candidate Management
candidatesSection.description: Organization managers can maintain a complete candidate database with pipeline tracking, file management, and evaluation integration.

features.f1: Full candidate profiles with contact info, files (CV, photo, certificates), and custom checklists
features.f2: 6-stage hiring pipeline: Interest Received → Contacted → Interviewed → Evaluated → Reference Check → Final Review
features.f3: Manager scoring (0-100), recommendations (hire, discard, contact, keep info), and private comments
features.f4: Link candidates to job positions and view their evaluation/test results
features.f5: Send invitation links — candidates register and become linked automatically
features.f6: Candidate self-service portal for updating personal info and uploading documents

reviewsSection.title: 360° and 180° Reviews
reviewsSection.description: Run multi-rater performance review campaigns with customizable evaluation criteria.

features.f1: Create review campaigns with configurable type (360° or 180°), date range, and participant selection
features.f2: Assign raters by role: self, supervisor, peer, or subordinate
features.f3: Track completion status and view scores across 9 dimensions (leadership, communication, teamwork, etc.)
features.f4: Compare ratings across rater roles for comprehensive performance insights

climateSection.title: Workplace Climate Surveys
climateSection.description: Measure organizational health with anonymous surveys across key workplace dimensions.

features.f1: Create surveys with scale and open-text questions across 6 categories
features.f2: Categories: work environment, leadership, communication, growth, compensation, work-life balance
features.f3: Anonymous response collection with department targeting
features.f4: Results dashboard with category scores, department breakdowns, highlights, and concerns

employeesSection.title: Employee Management
employeesSection.description: Manage your workforce with lifecycle tracking and probation period monitoring.

features.f1: Employee database with position, department, supervisor, and hire date
features.f2: Probation period evaluations with score tracking and alerts
features.f3: Link employees to evaluation profiles for ongoing assessment

jobFitSection.title: Job Fit Analysis
jobFitSection.description: Match candidates to job requirements with weighted multi-dimensional scoring.

features.f1: Define job profiles with minimum scores, preferred DISC styles, and custom weights
features.f2: 6-dimension weighted scoring: competency, cognitive, personality, aptitude, DISC, technical
features.f3: Gap analysis with priority classification (critical, important, minor)
features.f4: Side-by-side candidate comparison with radar charts

organizationsSection.title: Organizations
organizationsSection.description: Multi-tenant organization management with role-based access control.

features.f1: Create and manage organizations with customizable settings
features.f2: Invite members by email with role assignment (owner, admin, member, viewer)
features.f3: Configure AI analysis providers and API keys per organization

resultsSection.title: Results & Reports
resultsSection.description: Comprehensive reporting with visual charts, PDF exports, and data downloads.

features.f1: Interactive score gauges with level labels and category drill-down
features.f2: Comparative benchmarks showing candidate performance vs. profile average
features.f3: Radar charts for multi-dimensional competency visualization
features.f4: PDF export with cover page, executive summary, and detailed breakdown
features.f5: CSV and Excel export for evaluation history with custom filters
features.f6: AI-powered analysis with training recommendations (Claude, OpenAI, or Gemini)

resourcesSection.title: Resources
resourcesSection.description: Opinion articles, best practices, and FAQs about HR and careers in the AI era.

features.f1: 8 professional opinion articles on Human Resources, employment, and careers in the AI era
features.f2: FAQs on HR management and career planning with expert answers
features.f3: Perspectives from a multidisciplinary team: a human curator and three AI specialists
features.f4: Deep analysis on valuable skills, change management, and AI readiness
features.f5: Best practices for recruitment, professional development, and organizational transformation
features.f6: Professional and insightful content accessible to all platform users

aiStaffSection.title: AI Staff
aiStaffSection.description: Custom-built, fine-tuned AI agents designed for your organization — aligned with your culture, values, and team dynamics.

features.f1: Custom AI agents built specifically for your organization's structure, processes, and goals
features.f2: Fine-tuned to your company's culture, ethics, values, policies, and communication style
features.f3: Six specialized roles: Assistant, Supervisor, Consultant, Advisor, Analyst, and Coordinator
features.f4: Seamless integration with your human workforce — enhancing strengths and covering gaps
features.f5: Continuously optimized as your organization evolves — your AI Staff adapts with you
features.f6: Enterprise-grade security and compliance — trained on your domain, your data stays yours

benefits.title: The Value We Deliver
benefits.subtitle: Real savings, measurable productivity gains, and accelerated growth for your organization and your career
benefits.bizMoneyDesc: Organizations using skaills report significant cost reductions by eliminating inefficient hiring cycles, reducing turnover through better candidate-role matching, and replacing fragmented evaluation tools with one integrated platform.
benefits.bizTimeDesc: Automated evaluation scoring, AI-powered analysis, and streamlined workflows replace weeks of manual assessment work. What used to take your team days now takes minutes — with better accuracy.
benefits.hrEfficiencyDesc: From recruitment to performance reviews, every HR function is integrated and optimized. Your HR team shifts from administrative overload to strategic impact.
benefits.hrClimateDesc: Pre-built and fully customizable climate surveys that replace expensive third-party tools. Launch, collect, and analyze results in a fraction of the time — with actionable AI-generated insights.
benefits.hrClimateStatLabel: cost savings vs. traditional survey providers
benefits.hrReviewsDesc: Ready-to-use and customizable review campaigns with automated distribution, collection, and AI-powered summary reports. No more spreadsheets, no more chasing respondents.
benefits.hrRecruitmentDesc: End-to-end recruitment pipeline with position management, candidate tracking, campaign planning, and built-in skills evaluation. One platform replaces several disconnected tools.
benefits.prodMatchDesc: Our 43 evaluation profiles across 15 sectors and 5 levels ensure every hire and promotion is backed by data. Better role-person fit means higher engagement, lower turnover, and teams that actually perform.
benefits.prodInsightsDesc: Every evaluation generates personalized development recommendations, training paths, and actionable insights. Managers get clear guidance on how to maximize each team member's potential.
benefits.indCareerDesc: Stop wasting time and money on training and courses that don't align with your strengths. Our comprehensive assessments reveal your optimal career direction — saving you years of trial and error and thousands in irrelevant certifications.
benefits.indMatchTitle: Earn More with the Right Fit
benefits.indMatchDesc: Professionals in roles aligned with their natural strengths and competencies earn significantly more than those in mismatched positions. Our assessments help you find where you'll thrive — and where the money follows.
benefits.indMatchStatLabel: higher earning potential in aligned roles
benefits.indGrowthDesc: Get a clear roadmap of exactly which skills to develop for maximum career impact. Our AI-generated recommendations are personalized to your profile, your industry, and your goals — so every investment in yourself pays off.
benefits.whitelabelDesc: Offer our complete evaluation suite under your own brand. All 43 profiles, all assessment tools, climate surveys, 360° reviews, recruitment management, and AI-powered reports — customizable and ready to deploy for your clients.
benefits.whitelabelFeature1Desc: Full white-label with your logo, colors, domain, and client-facing reports. Your clients see your brand, you leverage our powerful engine.
benefits.whitelabelFeature2Desc: Stop juggling multiple tools. Evaluations, surveys, reviews, recruitment, and AI analysis — everything in one integrated platform you can offer to your clients.
benefits.whitelabelFeature3Desc: Tailor evaluation profiles, survey templates, review formats, and reports to each client's needs. Build custom assessment packages that differentiate your practice.
benefits.whitelabelFeature4Desc: Serve unlimited clients from a single platform. As your practice grows, your investment stays fixed while your revenue scales.
benefits.ctaSubtitle: Start with a free evaluation and see firsthand how skaills transforms your hiring, development, and HR operations.
benefits.aiStaffDesc: Can't find the right talent? We'll build them. Custom AI agents that integrate with your team, aligned with your culture, values, and processes — delivering measurable productivity gains across every department.
benefits.aiStaffFeature1: Custom-built for your organization's unique needs
benefits.aiStaffFeature2: Aligned with your culture, policies, and values
benefits.aiStaffFeature3: Integrated with your human team — not replacing them

aiStaff.title: AI Staff
aiStaff.heroTagline: Human-Grade AI Agents for Your Organization
aiStaff.heroTitle: Can't find the right person for the job?
aiStaff.heroSubtitle: Not just another AI tool dropped into a workflow. Our Human AI Agents are custom-built for your firm — fine-tuned to your culture, policies, values, and team dynamics. They integrate seamlessly with your people, not replace them.
aiStaff.boostSubtitle: Whether it's an assistant for your executives, a supervisor for your operations, a consultant for your strategy, or an advisor for your key workers — we build the perfect AI colleague.
aiStaff.boostAssistantDesc: Handles scheduling, research, drafting, and data analysis — freeing your team to focus on high-impact work.
aiStaff.boostSupervisorDesc: Monitors processes, flags anomalies, ensures compliance, and provides real-time operational oversight.
aiStaff.boostConsultantDesc: Delivers strategic analysis, market insights, competitive intelligence, and data-driven recommendations.
aiStaff.boostAdvisorDesc: Coaches employees, provides mentoring guidance, supports decision-making, and offers personalized development paths.
aiStaff.boostAnalystDesc: Processes large datasets, generates reports, identifies trends, and turns raw data into actionable business intelligence.
aiStaff.boostCoordinatorDesc: Manages cross-team workflows, tracks project milestones, synchronizes tasks, and keeps everyone aligned.
aiStaff.diffSubtitle: What makes our Human AI Agents fundamentally different from generic AI solutions
aiStaff.diff1Desc: Every agent is custom-designed around your company's structure, processes, and goals. Not a one-size-fits-all chatbot — a purpose-built team member.
aiStaff.diff2Desc: Your AI Staff operates according to your organization's ethics, policies, communication style, and brand voice. They represent you, not us.
aiStaff.diff3Desc: Designed to complement your human workforce — enhancing strengths, covering gaps, and adapting to team dynamics. They work with your people, not around them.
aiStaff.diff4Desc: Your AI agents evolve with your organization. As your processes, policies, or team composition change, your AI Staff adapts accordingly.
aiStaff.diff5Desc: Industry-specific knowledge, your internal documentation, your best practices — every agent is trained on what matters to your business.
aiStaff.diff6Desc: Enterprise-grade security, data privacy by design, and full compliance with your regulatory requirements. Your data stays yours.
aiStaff.howStep1Desc: We analyze your organization's structure, culture, workflows, and staffing needs to identify where AI agents deliver the most impact.
aiStaff.howStep2Desc: We build and fine-tune each agent to your specifications — your domain knowledge, your processes, your communication style, your rules.
aiStaff.howStep3Desc: Your AI Staff is deployed seamlessly into your existing workflows, with proper introductions and training for your human team.
aiStaff.howStep4Desc: Ongoing monitoring, feedback loops, and refinements ensure your AI agents keep improving and stay aligned with your evolving needs.
aiStaff.ucHRDesc: Screen candidates, schedule interviews, onboard new hires, answer policy questions, and manage employee inquiries — 24/7.
aiStaff.ucFinanceDesc: Process invoices, reconcile accounts, generate financial reports, flag anomalies, and ensure regulatory compliance.
aiStaff.ucOperationsDesc: Optimize supply chains, monitor KPIs, coordinate logistics, manage inventory, and streamline daily operations.
aiStaff.ucSalesDesc: Qualify leads, personalize outreach, analyze market trends, generate content, and manage CRM workflows.
aiStaff.ucSupportDesc: Handle tier-1 support, route complex issues, maintain knowledge bases, and deliver consistent service quality.
aiStaff.ucLegalDesc: Review contracts, track regulatory changes, manage compliance checklists, and flag risks before they become problems.
aiStaff.bottomCtaTitle: Ready to Build Your AI Team?
aiStaff.bottomCtaSubtitle: Tell us about your organization and the roles you need filled. We'll design AI agents that fit your culture, complement your people, and deliver measurable results.

about.title: About skaills
about.subtitle: Designed by humans, to empower humans
about.missionP1: skaills is a platform designed by humans to empower humans and corporations. We help organizations and individuals augment their potential, transform their skills, and achieve the optimal match between employees, employers, and AI.
about.missionP2: In an era where artificial intelligence is reshaping every industry, skaills bridges the gap between human talent and technological transformation — ensuring that people and organizations don't just adapt, but thrive.
about.suiteDesc: We offer a comprehensive platform for skills transformation, candidate recruitment, and human resources management, evaluation, and development.
about.evalDesc: Our platform delivers recognized evaluation methodologies alongside innovative assessments that go beyond traditional testing:
about.evalItem1: Competency-based evaluations across 43 profiles, 15 sectors, and 5 levels
about.evalItem2: Cognitive assessments with IQ percentile scoring
about.evalItem5: Numerical, verbal, and analytical aptitude testing
about.evalItem6: Technical knowledge evaluations with case studies
about.evalItem7: Per-role and per-profile skills assessments and readiness evaluations
about.evalItem8: Job-fit scoring with weighted multi-dimensional matching and gap analysis
about.indDesc: Whether you're exploring career options, preparing for a transition, or looking to grow in your current role, skaills provides the tools and insights to accelerate your professional development. Our personalized assessments reveal your strengths, identify growth areas, and generate AI-powered recommendations tailored to your goals.
about.hrDesc: skaills gives HR teams a unified platform to effectively evaluate candidates, recruit personnel, and manage staff — replacing fragmented tools with one integrated solution. From pre-hire assessments to post-hire development, climate surveys to 360° reviews, every HR function is covered.
about.hrItem1: Streamlined recruitment with position management and campaign planning
about.hrItem2: Candidate pipeline tracking with status management and scoring
about.hrItem3: Customizable work climate surveys with AI-generated insights
about.hrItem5: Employee management with probation tracking and development plans
about.hrItem6: Comparative analytics and historical evaluation database
about.whitelabelDesc: Our platform, tools, and services are available as a fully customizable white-label solution. HR consulting companies and professionals can deploy skaills under their own brand — offering the complete evaluation suite, recruitment tools, climate surveys, reviews, and AI-powered reports to their clients.
about.aiStaffDesc: Beyond evaluation, skaills offers custom-built AI agents designed for your organization. Our Human AI Agents are fine-tuned to your company's culture, policies, and processes — serving as assistants, supervisors, consultants, advisors, analysts, and coordinators that integrate seamlessly with your human team.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to Transform Your Skills Strategy?
about.ctaSubtitle: Start with a free evaluation and discover how skaills can empower your people and your organization.
